# MVP Role Assignment Contract

The runnable MVP must generate 14 warm-pool role assignments for each target task:

- Intake
- Repo Mapper
- Requirements
- Planner
- Architect
- Implementer
- Test Runner
- Reviewer
- Risk Guard
- Docs Keeper
- UX
- Dependency
- DevOps
- Auditor

Each generated role entry must include `role`, `status`, `task_id`, `epoch`, `scope`, `assignment`, and `expected_output`.

<!-- coding-agents-mvp:start -->
# Generated by coding-agents MVP

# Role Assignments

## Intake

- role: Intake
- status: assigned
- task_id: DOGFOOD-001
- epoch: E001-docs-only
- scope: docs/codex/*.md only; read-only: bin/coding-agents.mjs, skills/coding-agents/SKILL.md, .codex-plugin/plugin.json
- assignment: Confirm project instructions, cwd, task, and existing docs/codex state.
- expected_output: Intake summary with blockers.
